full_text:
Zhou Shen 周慎
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Shen (周慎). Badly beaten by Han Sui and Bian Zhang due to his failure to listen to advice. Zhou Shen was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhou Shen lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
